description_long: This stadium features a rectangular footprint with a prominent, sloped roof clad in reddish-brown tiles, forming a continuous border around the open central area. The exterior walls are smooth and light gray, with a horizontal band or recess running along the upper section, adding visual interest and breaking up the facade. The interior seating or stands are visible through the open roof, arranged in a tiered fashion and highlighted by red accents. The structure appears solid and robust, likely constructed from reinforced concrete and steel, with the roof providing partial shelter to the seating below. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on function and capacity, with minimal decorative elements. The stadium is well-suited for hosting sports events and accommodating large crowds in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular stadium with a reddish-brown tiled sloped roof, light gray exterior walls, and visible tiered seating with red accents. The design is functional and robust, emphasizing capacity and durability.
description_view_0: The stadium is seen from a side angle, showing the sloped roof, smooth gray facade, and a glimpse of the interior seating through the open roof.
description_view_1: This view highlights the horizontal band or recess on the facade, with the roof and interior seating more clearly visible through the open section.
description_view_2: The stadium is viewed from the opposite side, emphasizing the symmetry of the roof and the open central area with visible seating tiers.
description_view_3: This angle shows the horizontal band more prominently, with the red-accented seating clearly visible through the open roof.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is defined by smooth, light gray concrete walls with a continuous horizontal recess or band near the top, providing a subtle visual break. The sloped roof is clad in reddish-brown ceramic tiles, forming a prominent border around the open central area. The design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on structural solidity.
attribute_entrance_type: The main entrances are implied as wide, ground-level openings integrated into the facade, likely designed for high-capacity access. No ornate or specialized entrance forms are visible, suggesting a utilitarian approach.
